curation_notes: The fix spans two commits: d72c677 adds a type assignability check (IsAssignableFrom) to prevent loading types not assignable to the expected target, and 4382ff4 adds a specific blacklist for System.Diagnostics.Process. The pre-patch commit 6d9ac62 (v5.0.12) is the parent of the first fix commit and contains the full unpatched vulnerability. The vulnerability location is in the Deserialize method of BsonMapper.Deserialize.cs where the _type field value is used to resolve and set the deserialization type without any validation. No sibling files share this pattern as this is the single deserializer entry point.
